source.purpose: Protect Narrator guidance for honest density, silence, readable rhythm, scene headings, and word-count guardrails.

systemContainsAll: Use readable blank-line rhythm between dialogue, italic text, and narrative blocks
Use a short scene heading only when location or time meaningfully changes.
Use the narrative tempo word budgets above; honest density and dramatic need outrank filling a target
